items.rationale: Reads Web3 developer-activity growth as proof the space is structurally nascent with large upside ahead; positions himself as a long-term builder/contributor.
items.age_note: Core thesis stated Jan 2022 (~12 months old) and never restated in the most recent Dec 2022 posts, which turned toward operating discipline; treat enthusiasm as persisting but not freshly reaffirmed.

citations.quote: Love @ElectricCapital's annual analysis of Web3 developer activity. By any measure, we are still early days.

items.rationale: Actively committed as a contributor to an accelerator focused on launching the next generation of Web3 and DeFi startups — direct skin-in-the-game enthusiasm for early-stage building.
items.age_note: Stated Jan 2022; not restated later in the year.

citations.quote: Excited to be a contributor to @alliancedao. Looking forward to being part of building the next generation of Web3 and defi startups.

items.rationale: Sees gaming as a uniquely powerful mechanism for onboarding mainstream users into new crypto ecosystems and economies.
items.age_note: Stated once on 2021-10-18 (~14 months old) and never restated; carries Axie-era play-to-earn framing that he has not refreshed.

citations.quote: amazing the power that gaming can have in terms of onboarding people into the new ecosystems/economies

items.rationale: Engages deeply with on-chain data and metrics like open interest, signaling a data-driven interest in reading crypto market structure.

citations.quote: Would love to see an episode on breaking down and understanding OI trends

items.rationale: His most recent posts stress survival, avoiding bankruptcy, and that the cost-cutting/founder-discipline 'Elon playbook' is just standard practice — a clear cautionary turn on the funding/operating environment.
items.age_note: Most recent view (Dec 2022); reflects a shift in tone from the optimistic early-2022 building posts.

citations.quote: staying alive to play another hand was better than going BK was simply standard operating procedure for any founder/CEO
Thinking that a CPO can solve/find PMF is a road to ruin for a Company/Co-Founder

risk_regime.rationale: Structurally a long-term Web3/DeFi bull (early-2022 'still early days' and accelerator commitment), but his most recent Dec 2022 statements pivot to capital discipline, survival, and PMF realism — a cautious, defensive operating posture. Net: structurally constructive, tactically guarded.

notes: Corpus is heavily skewed toward consumer-tech/Google product posts (Pixel, Fi, Android) and personal interests, with only a thin set of genuine crypto/market signals. No specific tokens were named (Axie Infinity referenced as a project, not a token position). Recency weighting matters here: the early-2022 excitement is structural and unreversed but stale, while the only late-2022 signals are about founder discipline and surviving a downturn — hence the risk regime is read as structurally bullish but tactically defensive. Low overall data density; treat individual conviction scores as soft.
